text: SIGACT report: On 14 MAR 2025, network intrusion detected at MINDEF-SG perimeter gateway. Adversary deployed custom RAT via spear-phishing campaign targeting procurement division personnel. Lateral movement observed across three network segments before containment. IOCs consistent with APT activity previously attributed to state-affiliated group TIDEPOOL. Exfiltration of 2.4GB compressed archive confirmed via DNS tunneling to C2 infrastructure at 103.28.xx.xx.

Open-source monitoring flagged increased propaganda activity across Southeast Asian social media platforms during 01-07 MAR 2025. Content analysis indicates coordinated messaging campaign promoting extremist ideology with specific references to regional military installations. Linguistic markers suggest machine-translated material originating from known radical networks. No credible operational threat identified at this time. Recommend continued monitoring under standing collection plan CHARLIE-SEVEN.

Quarterly assessment of foreign intelligence service activity in the maritime sector. HUMINT reporting indicates increased approach activity targeting personnel at Changi Naval Base and Tuas Naval Facility during Q4 2024. Three separate incidents involving suspected intelligence officers under diplomatic cover documented. Subjects employed standard elicitation techniques during social functions hosted by defence industry contractors. All incidents reported through proper CI channels.

Incident report: Supply chain integrity alert. Routine audit of defence logistics contractor PT Nusantara Logistics identified anomalous invoicing patterns across 47 transactions totaling SGD 3.2M during FY2024. Forensic accounting review reveals systematic overbilling consistent with procurement fraud. Two company officers have been referred to the Commercial Affairs Department. No evidence of foreign involvement or classified material compromise at this time.

Personnel security notification: Background reinvestigation of civilian analyst assigned to Joint Intelligence Directorate revealed undisclosed foreign contacts and unreported overseas travel to a country of concern during 2023-2024. Subject failed polygraph examination on questions related to unauthorized disclosure. Subject's access to classified systems suspended pending formal investigation under OSA proceedings. All materials accessed by subject during the period under review are being audited.
